creator: laszlof@FreeBSD.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

This feature would be very useful. Its much safer to gradually move
things over to LOCALBASE rather than one large bulk move. Here is a
short list of ports that could utilize this feature:

audio/gai-visual-audio
audio/normalize
chinese/fireflyttf
chinese/moettf
devel/dbus
devel/pkg-config
french/aster
games/flightgear-atlas
graphics/goom
graphics/hpoj
japanese/ipa-ttfonts
japanese/sazanami-ttf
japanese/vlgothic
java/linux-ibm-jdk13
lang/mono
mail/faces
misc/shared-mime-info
multimedia/xawtv
net/penguintv-devel
net/tcpview
sysutils/asr-utils
sysutils/gkrellm2
sysutils/gkrelltop
sysutils/kkbswitch
sysutils/ntfsprogs
www/linuxpluginwrapper
x11-fonts/arkpandora
x11-fonts/avifonts
x11-fonts/bitstream-vera
x11-fonts/dejavu
x11-fonts/gentium
x11-fonts/junicode
x11-fonts/mgopen
x11-fonts/webfonts
x11/xscreensaver
x11/xscreensaver-gnome

I will provide patches for all of these ports to utilize the new knobs.

- -Frank
